<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Metaalperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gĕng-ngū]][[de:Metall-Pferd]][[fr:Cheval de métal]][[hak:Kâng-ńg]][[ja:庚午]][[ko:경오]][[nds:Metall-Peerd]][[vi:Canh Ngọ]][[za:Gengngux]][[zh-min-nan:Keng-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:庚午]][[zh:庚午]]

{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|広島市の地名|庚午 (広島市)|北海道の「庚午三ノ村」|円山町 (北海道)|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Horse also known as  Kanoe-uma''' (庚午, also known as  '''Kōkin-no-uma''' or '''Kōgo''') is one of the combinations of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 7th combination in the sexagenary cycle, following [[Yin Earth Snake]] and preceding [[Yin Metal Goat]]. In [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] '''Kanoe''' (庚) represents Yang [[Metal (wuxing)|Metal (金)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] '''Uma''' (午) represents Yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], resulting in a [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]] (Fire overcomes Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Horse (庚午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: kougo
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongo (경오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Ngọ

==Years of Yang Metal Horse==
For years in the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 10.<br>
For years before the Common Era, a year is a Kanoe-uma year if, when divided by 60, the remainder is 51.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Kanoe-uma Years'''
|-
![[1st Millennium BC]]!![[1st Millennium AD]]!![[2nd Millennium AD]]!![[3rd Millennium AD]]
|-
|
*[[:en:951 BC|951 BC]]
*[[:en:891 BC|891 BC]]
*[[:en:831 BC|831 BC]]
*[[771 BC]]
*[[711 BC]]
*[[651 BC]]
*[[591 BC]]
*[[531 BC]]
*[[471 BC]]
*[[411 BC]]
*[[351 BC]]
*[[291 BC]]
*[[231 BC]]
*[[171 BC]]
*[[111 BC]]
*[[51 BC]]
|
*[[:en:10 AD|10 AD]]
*[[:en:70 AD|70 AD]]
*[[:en:130 AD|130 AD]]
*[[:en:190 AD|190 AD]]
*[[:en:250 AD|250 AD]]
*[[:en:310 AD|310 AD]]
*[[:en:370 AD|370 AD]]
*[[:en:430 AD|430 AD]]
*[[:en:490 AD|490 AD]]
*[[:en:550 AD|550 AD]]
*[[:en:610 AD|610 AD]]
*[[:en:670 AD|670 AD]]
*[[:en:730 AD|730 AD]]
*[[:en:790 AD|790 AD]]
*[[:en:850 AD|850 AD]]
*[[:en:910 AD|910 AD]]
*[[:en:970 AD|970 AD]]
|
*[[:en:1030 AD|1030 AD]]
*[[:en:1090 AD|1090 AD]]
*[[:en:1150 AD|1150 AD]]
*[[:en:1210 AD|1210 AD]]
*[[:en:1270 AD|1270 AD]]
*[[:en:1330 AD|1330 AD]]
*[[:en:1390 AD|1390 AD]]
*[[:en:1450 AD|1450 AD]]
*[[:en:1510 AD|1510 AD]]
*[[:en:1570 AD|1570 AD]]
*[[:en:1630 AD|1630 AD]]
*[[:en:1690 AD|1690 AD]]
*[[:en:1750 AD|1750 AD]]
*[[:en:1810 AD|1810 AD]]
*[[:en:1870 AD|1870 AD]]
*[[:en:1930 AD|1930 AD]]
*[[:en:1990 AD|1990 AD]]
|
*[[:en:2050 AD|2050 AD]]
*[[2110 AD]]
*[[2170 AD]]
*[[2230 AD]]
*[[2290 AD]]
*[[2350 AD]]
*[[2410 AD]]
*[[2470 AD]]
*[[2530 AD]]
*[[2590 AD]]
*[[2650 AD]]
*[[2710 AD]]
*[[2770 AD]]
*[[2830 AD]]
*[[2890 AD]]
*[[2950 AD]]
|}

=== Notable Events ===
* Birth year of [[Emperor Jimmu]], the legendary first emperor of Japan.
* Year 670 AD - [[Koseki system in classical Japan]], an important early census system in Japan under [[Emperor Tenji]].
* Year 1870 AD - [[Q11485995]].

==Months of Yang Metal Horse==
In years where the last digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the [[Heavenly Stems]] of Kō (甲) or Ki (己)), the fifth month (May) is a Kanoe-uma month. However, the definition may apply to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or [[Solar term]] (from [[Mangzhong]] to the day before [[Xiaoshu]]).

==Days of Yang Metal Horse==
=== Special Calendar Significance ===
Kanoe-uma days have the following calendar attributes:
* [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)]] (First day of major land restriction periods)
* [[Rekichū Gedan]] (Auspicious day for shrine visits)
* [[Rekichū Gedan]] (Auspicious day for general affairs)

== Other Uses ==
In [[Hiroshima]], the [[Q11485994]] was named after the year 1870, in which it was developed.
== See Also ==
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly Stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]

{{wikidata link|Q1062141}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
